description_long: This is a small, single-story wooden cabin with a prominent gable roof made of dark metal panels. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic appearance. There is a single rectangular window with a grid pattern on one side, while the opposite gable end features a large, multi-pane window that nearly spans the entire wall. The roof has a significant overhang, providing some protection to the walls below. No exterior doors or porches are visible in the provided views, and the cabin appears to be designed for residential or retreat use. The overall structure is compact and sturdy, suitable for placement in parks, neighborhoods, or as a standalone urban retreat.
description: A compact wooden cabin with a dark gable roof, horizontal plank siding, and large windows on two sides. The design is rustic and sturdy, ideal for residential or retreat settings.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from above, showing the dark metal gable roof and a side wall with a single rectangular window.
description_view_1: This view highlights the gable end with no windows or doors, displaying the vertical wood paneling under the roof and horizontal planks below.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side also features the dark gable roof and a single rectangular window, mirroring the opposite side.
description_view_3: The gable end is dominated by a large, multi-pane window that covers most of the wall, providing ample natural light to the interior.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a steep pitch and dark metal panels, featuring significant overhangs on all sides
attribute_window_arrangement: one medium-sized rectangular window with a grid pattern on one side and a single large, multi-pane window spanning most of the gable end; the arrangement is asymmetrical and maximizes natural light on one end
attribute_door_placement: no exterior doors are visible on any side in the provided views
